id.description: Unique identifier for this photo in the timeline.

source.description: Whether this photo comes from a linked album or a direct post upload.

albumName.description: Album name when source is 'album'; null otherwise.

linkId.description: Famlin-side link id when source is 'album'; null otherwise.

assetId.description: Provider-defined asset id when source is 'album'; null otherwise.

postId.description: Post id when source is 'post'; null otherwise.
